\tzpentry{ID5538}{Density Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5538 introduces Density Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho(x,t) = m_0\, n(x,t), \qquad \partial_t n = \lambda(x,t) - \Gamma n + D_n \nabla^2 n. \end{equation}
